title: Application Administrator (Lietojumprogrammu administrators/-e) at Baltic IT Services | SEB, Riga

summary.lv: Lietojumprogrammu administrators SEB Baltic IT Services — biznesa kritisko lietotņu uzturēšana, veiktspējas optimizācija un migrācija uz GCP, darbs ar Java/Tomcat, OpenShift/Kubernetes un Kafka; ietver dežūru rotāciju aptuveni katru piekto nedēļu.
summary.en: Application administrator at SEB's Baltic IT Services maintaining business-critical applications, performance tuning and a GCP migration, working with Java/Tomcat, OpenShift/Kubernetes and Kafka; includes an on-call rotation roughly every fifth week.
